description: Send the input to the node to the list of addresses provided

tag.description: The tag that the output message should be tagged with
tag.title: Message Tag

recipient_list.description: A comma-separated list of email addresses. Supports Jinja2 templates.
recipient_list.title: Recipient List

body.description: Optional Jinja2 template for the email body. If empty, the pipeline input is used.
body.title: Body
